note: golden_hash filled by `node golden-parity.test.mjs --update`. FLOP counts travel as decimal strings (I-JSON safe-integer rule, RFC 7493).

vectors.name: empty-insufficient
vectors.description: No attributes supplied; finite-gate, out of scope by default.

output_payload.statute_citation: Cal. SB 53 (Transparency in Frontier Artificial Intelligence Act), eff. 2026-01-01

vectors.name: below-flop-threshold
vectors.description: Compute well under 10^26 FLOPs; out of scope regardless of revenue.

output_payload.statute_citation: Cal. SB 53 (Transparency in Frontier Artificial Intelligence Act), eff. 2026-01-01

vectors.name: frontier-not-large-developer
vectors.description: Over the FLOP threshold but under the $500M revenue bar; base obligations only.

output_payload.statute_citation: Cal. SB 53 (Transparency in Frontier Artificial Intelligence Act), eff. 2026-01-01

vectors.name: large-frontier-developer
vectors.description: Over both the FLOP and revenue thresholds; full obligation set.

output_payload.statute_citation: Cal. SB 53 (Transparency in Frontier Artificial Intelligence Act), eff. 2026-01-01
